Type Property# keyboardWillHide

iOS 26.0+iPadOS 26.0+Mac Catalyst 26.0+

```
static var keyboardWillHide: NotificationCenter.BaseMessageIdentifier<UIResponder.KeyboardWillHideMessage> { get }
```

Available when `Self` is `NotificationCenter.BaseMessageIdentifier<UIResponder.KeyboardWillHideMessage>`.## [See Also](/documentation/foundation/notificationcenter/messageidentifier/keyboardwillhide#see-also)
